## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the conventions in `CLAUDE.md` (ESM only, ORM rules, module layout)
- [ ] `cd backend && npm run lint` → 0 problems
- [ ] `cd backend && npm run typecheck` → 0 errors
- [ ] `cd backend && npm test` (and `npm run check`) pass
- [ ] Frontend (if touched): `npm run typecheck` / `npm run build` pass
- [ ] No secrets, real credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/API changed
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
